_readme: PROMOTED TEMPLATE (Annex of spec 017). The agent-card the DroneScout ASM's Seller Proxy publishes off-chain on the Neuron-blind translator's behalf (015 FR-S96); the EIP-8004 (007) Identity Registry entry stores the agentId + the agentURI pointing to THIS document. STRUCTURE (015 FR-S20a): this IS the 003 agentURI registration file — its `services[]` follows the Neuron 003/004 schema and MUST carry the mandatory services: three neuron-topic (stdIn/stdOut/stdErr, 003 FR-R02/R08), one neuron-p2p-exchange (003 FR-R03), plus the 008 neuron-commerce service(s) for each consumable feed (here: rid; 015 FR-S70). An ERC-8004 explorer reads name/description + services[] (topics, p2p, commerce) WITHOUT SAPIENT. The additive blocks identity (the FR-S22 PeerID/key binding + on-chain 007 reference) and capabilities/statusDefinition/tasking/extensions (the SAPIENT Registration content = the ICD, FR-S20) + trust (the SAPIENT signature-verification locus) ride alongside — an 8004 explorer ignores them, a SAPIENT-aware consumer reads them. PROXY-vs-TRANSLATOR split: the Seller Proxy fills the Neuron-side blocks (services[] + identity) and owns the on-chain identity; the translator supplies the SAPIENT-content blocks. The top-level `type` is OPTIONAL upstream-ERC-8004 (registration-v1) alignment; 003/004 govern the structure. Replace every <...> placeholder. Illustrative: the NORMATIVE requirements are 017 FR-R-A02/A03 + 015 FR-S20/S20a/S24 + 003/004; where this skeleton conflicts with the verified DSTL protos, 017's 'Mapping — reconciliations' table, or 003/004, those GOVERN. The SAPIENT-content field names approximate the BSI Flex 335 v2.0 protos — reconcile before production.
name: neuron-rid-bridge DroneScout ASM
description: SAPIENT Autonomous Sensor Module: decodes broadcast Remote ID (OpenDroneID) from a DroneScout sensor and emits SAPIENT DetectionReports with the neuron.rid/1 extension.

services.name: stdIn
services._note: Auditable 004 lane, inbound to the ASM: HLDMM->ASM control (RegistrationAck/Task/AlertAck), 015 FR-S12. Schema per 003 FR-R02 / 004 FR-T14.

services.name: stdOut
services._note: Routine ASM output: the in-session Registration replay, TaskAck, and the periodic StatusReport (015 FR-S12).

services.name: stdErr
services._note: Exceptional ASM signals: Alert and the SAPIENT Error message (015 FR-S12).

services.name: p2p
services._note: How a consumer obtains the ASM multiaddr for the 009 p2p DetectionReport stream (003 FR-R03 / 004 FR-T17). The /sapient/detection/2.0.0 stream rides this p2p connection. The actual multiaddr is exchanged over the referenced topic, not stored here.

services.name: rid
services._note: The consumable SAPIENT feed (008 FR-P01/P03, 015 FR-S70). DetectionReports ride /sapient/detection/2.0.0 on the 009 p2p stream reachable via the neuron-p2p-exchange service above. 017 fixes neither unit nor amount (CL-R3); free = amount '0'; interval '0' = one-time; settlement is deployment-specific.

identity._note: Additive Neuron block (outside the 003 service schema): the FR-S22 PeerID/key binding plus the on-chain 007 reference. peerId/publicKey is the trust anchor and MUST match the on-chain key; the Seller Proxy owns and binds it (015 FR-S94). agentId/identityRegistry name the on-chain 007 entry whose agentURI resolves to THIS document (015 FR-S24).

capabilities._note: Additive SAPIENT-content block (the ICD = the SAPIENT Registration content, 015 FR-S20). An ERC-8004 explorer ignores it; a SAPIENT-aware consumer reads it.
capabilities._trackingNote: → SAPIENT mode_definition.scan_type = SCAN_TYPE_FIXED, tracking_type = TRACKING_TYPE_TRACK (017 FR-R-A02 / FR-R-D02): the RF footprint is fixed/omnidirectional, and a stable object_id is persisted per drone keyed on the broadcast Remote-ID identity (BasicID[0].UASID) across broken tracks and BLE MAC rotation — the MAC is the transient radio key, not the id key.
capabilities._classificationNote: Taxonomy is UAV ONLY (017 FR-R-A04). The operator is NOT a separate object class: per the one-report model (FR-R-D04 / clarification 2026-05-30) operator data rides the SAME UAV DetectionReport as rid.operator* object_info under the neuron.rid/1 extension below — metadata on the craft, not a declared class. (A deployment that genuinely tracks the operator as its own moving object uses the linked-second-detection alternative, Mapping note O1 — still not a new taxonomy class.)

coverage.note: RID is received, not ranged; coverage is the RF reception footprint of the sensor, not a steerable FoV. Fill with the sensor's sited reception area if known.

statusDefinition.note: SAPIENT Registration.status_definition.status_interval (015 FR-S20): the cadence at which this ASM emits StatusReports (sensor health/coverage/mode) on the auditable 004 lane. This is the SAPIENT heartbeat cadence, NOT the Neuron 005 liveness heartbeat (node ALIVE/OFFLINE), which the node emits separately (015 FR-S31). Replace PT10S with the sited cadence.

tasking.note: SAPIENT mode_definition.task — the controls/filters this ASM accepts (015 FR-S25/S26). CONTROL_STOP + CONTROL_START are a MANDATORY per-session baseline (015 FR-S29 / 017 FR-R-D09): a well-formed STOP MUST be acked and MUST cease DetectionReport emission to THAT session within ceaseWindow; CONTROL_START resumes without a new Registration; neither affects any other consumer's stream. Per-session OUTPUT FILTERS accepted: region_definition + class_filter_definition. NO detection_report_rate decimation (RID is bursty/low-rate). An altitude-band filter via neuron.rid/1 is PENDING (017 CL-R7) and not yet accepted.
tasking.ceaseWindowNote: Max latency from a CONTROL_STOP TaskAck to DetectionReports ceasing on that session (015 FR-S29); bounded, hard ceiling PT5S.

extensions.note: Carries the Remote ID payload (rid.* objectInfo namespace) and the authentication block. An HLDMM that does not load this schema ignores rid.* entries and the authentication field per SAPIENT extension rules.

trust.note: SAPIENT signature-verification locus. The ASM forwards authentication.signatureB64 with verification=unsigned|unverified. The HLDMM verifies it against the identity key above (resolved via this card / the on-chain 007 entry) and sets verification=verified|failed.
